author: gowtham0992
name: E2E TTT: End-to-End Test-Time Training with Meta-Learning
blurb: First E2E TTT submission. MAML-style meta-learning during training: inner loop does gradient descent on MLP weights using next-token prediction loss, outer loop backprops through inner steps (gradients of gradients) to optimize W0 for test-time adaptation. Standard 11L Transformer architecture unchanged. Meta-learning applied during final 20% of training. Eval uses score-first TTT + vectorized 7-gram backoff + kNN-LM.
